names.ar: Travelling boat, Meketre, music, harp; (Travelling Boat being Rowed)

dimensions.text: l. 128 cm (50 3/8 in), with rudder 175 cm (68 7/8 in) x w. with oars 30.5 cm (12 in) x h. 37 cm (14 9/16 in)

description.ar: Travelling boat, Meketre, music, harp; مصرية قديمة، معروفة بـ«Travelling Boat being Rowed»، تعود إلى الدولة الوسطى، (الأسرة الثانية عشرة)، مصنوعة من خشب وpaint وgesso وlinen twine and linen fabric، محفوظة حاليًا في متحف المتروبوليتان للفنون، نيويورك.
description.en: Travelling Boat being Rowed — Travelling boat, Meketre, music, harp;. Period: Middle Kingdom, Dynasty 12, dated to ca. 1981–1975 B.C.. Medium: Wood, paint, gesso, linen twine and linen fabric. Dimensions: l. 128 cm (50 3/8 in), with rudder 175 cm (68 7/8 in) x w. with oars 30.5 cm (12 in) x h. 37 cm (14 9/16 in). Excavation: MMA excavations, 1920. Country of origin: Egypt. Credit: Rogers Fund and Edward S. Harkness Gift, 1920.
